articles.title: US and Iran begin talks seen as crucial to prevent conflict
articles.summary: The indirect negotiations in Geneva are seen as a last-ditch effort, but the chances of a nuclear agreement are unclear.

articles.title: 'Fear is everywhere': BBC reports from Mexican city turned into war zone by drug cartel feud
articles.summary: Culiacán in northern Mexico has seen a surge in violence as rival factions of the Sinaloa cartel battle for control.

articles.title: Israeli soldiers shot a Palestinian boy and stood around as he bled to death, video shows
articles.summary: Israeli forces blocked Palestinian ambulances while a 14-year-old lay bleeding for at least 45 minutes.

articles.title: Cuba says it shot dead four people on US-registered speedboat
articles.summary: The passengers were Cuban nationals living in the US and intended to "carry out an infiltration for terrorist purposes", the Cuban government says.

articles.title: Shot in school uniform: BBC reveals police order led to Gen Z protest killings in Nepal
articles.summary: New evidence reveals what happened when 19 people were shot dead in Kathmandu last September.

articles.title: Nigeria to hold inquest into death of Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie's toddler
articles.summary: The internationally acclaimed writer has accused Nigerian hospital Euracare of negligence, which it denies.

articles.title: Orban steps up oil accusations against Ukraine after vetoing EU loan to Kyiv
articles.summary: Hungary's prime minister accuses Kyiv of imposing an "oil blockade" after Kyiv says a critical pipeline was closed after Russian strikes.

articles.title: Hong Kong tycoon Jimmy Lai wins appeal against fraud conviction
articles.summary: The 78-year-old Lai, however, remains detained for a separate national security case.

articles.title: North Korea could 'get along' with US, says Kim Jong Un
articles.summary: Kim said they could get along if the US accepts that Pyongyang's nuclear weapons are here to stay.

articles.title: US 'suitcase murderer' deported from Bali after 11 years in jail
articles.summary: The 33-year-old will still face federal charges in the US and is due to appear in court on Thursday.
